title: [codereview-pass1] status_notify paths lack capacity check before CBOR encoding and packet construction
description: In coap_status.c:status_notify, neighbors_notify: no check against CONFIG_LICHEN_DTN_MAX_MESSAGES or observer queue capacity before buffering notification. Can lead to OOM or truncation under high load/ many observers. Add strict check and error path. Also add BUILD_ASSERT in lichen_coap_status_init for buffer sizes vs CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_MESSAGE_SIZE.
close_reason: Fixed in pass3: capacity BUILD_ASSERTs, strict checks, comment stripping per task
